title: Jar Lid Grippers Grip Non Slip Rubber Pad
description:
About this item
5" Diameter
Textured rubber grip makes opening jars or bottles easy
You get a quality gripper
reviews_5s: I have never had a problem opening a jar lid. Sure, some are tough to open, but a little hit here and there on the rim with the edge of a butter knife or, as a last resort, heating the lid with hot water have always worked for me. Until recently, when I met Klaus, a lid on a Claussen sauerkraut jar. Klaus gave me fits. Time and time again, I would return to the kitchen counter, apply my strength and use my bag of tricks, but he would not budge. That's why I tried this product. It was cheap, so what could I lose? It came in the mail today. A few minutes ago, I took Klaus and his jar out of the refrigerator, removed the pad from its package, turned Klaus and his jar on their side, covered Klaus with the pad, held tight, and turned. Presto, Klaus capitulated in half a second. The jar opened and now I can eat my sauerkraut. I am a real happy guy. Man over stubborn packaging. Sorry for the theatrics, but the pad works. It provides a great grip. Some people here complain there are not two in the package. That is true, but I don't see a problem. You only need one. The pad is substantial and will probably last forever, if you want to keep it that long.Use the product. Purchased for a friend of mineWorks great. Good grip. Works like all the others in the past. Used to get these free from various business, or purchase at grocery store. Couldn’t find any, so ordered from Amazon. Works greatI finally wore out my first gripper I had for many years. I absolutely love these grippers for opening different size jars. It makes it more comfortable to open a stubborn lid that does not want to open. It's one of those smart kitchen tools you always want to have around.Perfect sizeI initially ordered one, then i ordered 3 more to keep around the home. I have some strength issues due to medical reasons and this has been a God sent. I was having trouble opening tumbler water bottles. Now it’s become much easier and doesn’t deplete my already limited energy. You can use these on whatever, jars etc. great quality and durability as well.Really durable...even better than my old ones which were pretty good!great productThese grippers used to be everywhere, and for free or very cheap. Now I can’t find any locally. Found this one and am happy with it but it’s ridiculous to pay nearly $6 for one thin piece of rubber. Still, it makes jars much easier on my hands!Especially like that these jar openers are thick enough to be effective. So often these products are thin, not this brand.
reviews_1s: Very small. Very flimsy. Ridiculous price for a small piece of rubber. I was expecting something more substantial. Also, the item appears to be dirty or stained inside the sealed wrapper. I was going to return it, but found out it is "not eligible for return"! That should be printed in big, bold letters so you know the risk you are taking. Very disappointed in Amazon and this seller, Symak Sales.I am an idiot...I ASSUMED for the price (and the title) I was getting MULTIPLE grippers. Complete rip off. It is a simple product and even selling for $1.00 would still present a profit. Don't be fooled.Very disappointed. I have RA and this was too difficult for me to squeeze or use. Also was looking for something to open smaller lids- like bottles.CAUTION - misleading headline: Despite the headline "grippers", this item is a "single"gripper. Other grippers for sale are a better value.Very thin, not very grippy. I do not recommend.Does not assist in opening jars and bottles the way I was hoping it would.Couldn’t open anythingDescription states Lid GripperS but only one is supplied. False advertisingBarely works. I have to use a lot of pressure.Doesn't work. Slips ..doesn't grip
